titleStmt.title: SII 26.386: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 386. (A.R. No. 365 of 1909.) TĀYAṈŪR, GINGEE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Śaka 1478, Naḷa, Śiṅga (Āvaṇi) śu. 6, Tuesday, Svāti = 1556 A.D., August 11.

summary.p: This inscription is engraved by the side of a long sketch representing the linear measure, carved on the rock.

It records, pointing to the carving, that this is the kōl (rod) used for measuring lands in three villages, one called Malaiyaṉūr, the second Toṟu[ppām ?], and the third (name lost) and that this was (the decision) of a certain Pārañji Tiṁmaiyaṅgarāśāyar, the agent of Kōvilt-Tiruvēṅkaḍa, the Jīyar of the big temple of Tirumalai Tiruppati, who is described as Vēdamāṟgapratiṭṭāchārya, Parama-aṅsa-parivviṟāśakāchāriya and Vēdāntāchāriya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī . śakāptam 1000 4 100 7 10 8l cellāni
ṉṟa naḷavaruṣattu ciṅkaṉāyaṟṟu pūṟuva
pakṣattu ṣaṣṭiyum maṅkaḷavāramum pe
ṟṟa coti nakṣattirattu ṉāḷ śrīmate
rāmāṉucāya namaḥ śrīmatuvetamāṟka
pratiṭṭācāriya paramaaṅcaparivviṟācakācā
riya vetāntacāriyarāṉa tirumalai tiruppati
periyakovil keḻvi kovilt tiruveṅ
kaṭavumaṉu ciyar kāriyattukku karttarāṉa pāra
ñci timmaiyaṅkarācāyarai malaiya
ṉūr toṟuppām Inta mūṉṟūril
kaḻaṉiyiṟ va� 10 4 Aṭiyum ta
maivum vilatakamākavum poḻukki
maṉṟum Ākavum Irupatteḻuṉā
l Aḷantiṭṭa Aḷavukol §
Digital edition of SII 26.386 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
